description_long: This is a modern military jet aircraft with a sleek, angular fuselage and a dark camouflage paint scheme. The airplane features twin vertical stabilizers at the tail, sharply swept-back wings with a slight anhedral angle, and prominent engine nacelles at the rear. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, likely accommodating two crew members in tandem. The landing gear is deployed, showing a tricycle configuration with two main wheels and a single nose wheel. Distinctive red star insignias are visible on the wings, indicating a military origin, and the overall design emphasizes aerodynamic efficiency and maneuverability.
description: A dark, camouflaged military jet with twin vertical stabilizers, swept-back wings, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. The aircraft displays deployed tricycle landing gear and red star insignias on the wings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the wide, swept-back wings with twin vertical stabilizers visible behind.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit canopy, deployed landing gear, and the angular tail section with twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts, the full span of the swept-back wings, and the twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit, landing gear, and the distinctive tail and wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and a slight anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a tandem seating arrangement under a clear canopy.
